src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Wrap authentication logic in try-catch to handle BadCredentialsException and return a proper error response.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Without this change, authentication failures throw an unhandled exception, resulting in a 500 Internal Server Error instead of a controlled 400 Bad Request response.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update import path for ClinicOwner and ClinicOwnerService to reflect package renaming from clinic_owner to clinicowner.
Update import path for MessageResponse to use fully qualified package name.
Add Swagger/OpenAPI security requirement annotation to enforce bearer authentication on the controller.
Add EnumType.STRING annotation to ensure enum is stored as string rather than ordinal.
Change relationship from OneToOne to ManyToOne for Owner association.
Change relationship from OneToOne to ManyToOne for Pet association.
